use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms, modals, and landing pages
Icon buttons for toolbars, navigation bars, and action menus
Destructive action buttons requiring confirmation or warning states
Secondary and tertiary action buttons alongside primary CTAs
Ghost and link-style buttons for less prominent navigation or inline actions
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features accessible focus ring states with smooth hover transitions, making it suitable as a foundational UI element across SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, and dev tools platforms.
